description_long: This is an adult human figure with a short hairstyle, dressed in a layered urban outfit suitable for cool weather. The person wears a fitted, buttoned vest over a collared shirt with long sleeves, paired with slim jeans and ankle-high boots. The facial features are clearly defined, and the figure stands in a neutral, upright pose with arms extended horizontally. The clothing appears casual yet slightly formal, with the vest adding a touch of sophistication. The figure's build is average, and the proportions are realistic for an adult. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: An adult figure in a collared shirt, vest, jeans, and boots, standing upright with arms outstretched. The look is urban and casual with a touch of formality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt, buttoned vest, facial features, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the layered clothing, and the side of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vest, shirt, jeans, and the back of the head and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left, with clear visibility of the arm and leg contours.
attribute_clothing_type: collared shirt with long sleeves, buttoned vest, slim jeans, ankle-high boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
